languages.text: "Судя по тому, что я знаю о вас, Себериан, не вам упрекать меня в излишнем радикализме".

traits.locale_text: [draft] говорим, что судя по тому, что мы о нем знаем, не ему нас упрекать в радикальных решениях.

languages.text: "From what I know about you, Seberian, you are hardly the one to accuse me of excessive radicalism."
languages.original_text: "Судя по тому, что я знаю о вас, Себериан, не вам упрекать меня в излишнем радикализме".

traits.locale_text: "From what I know about you, Seberian, you are hardly the one to accuse me of excessive radicalism."
"From what I know about you, Seberian, you are hardly the one to accuse me of excessive radicalism."
"From what I know about you, Seberian, you are hardly the one to accuse me of excessive radicalism."
"From what I know about you, Seberian, you are hardly the one to accuse me of excessive radicalism."

languages.text: «Por lo que sé de usted, Seberian, no está en posición de acusarme de ser excesivamente radical».
languages.original_text: "From what I know about you, Seberian, you are hardly the one to accuse me of excessive radicalism."

traits.locale_text: «Por lo que sé de usted, Seberian, no está en posición de acusarme de ser excesivamente radical».

languages.text: “就我对你的了解，塞贝里安，你恐怕没什么资格指责我太过激进。”
languages.original_text: "From what I know about you, Seberian, you are hardly the one to accuse me of excessive radicalism."

traits.locale_text: “就我对你的了解，塞贝里安，你恐怕没什么资格指责我太过激进。”

languages.text: « À en juger par vos états de service, Seberian, vous êtes mal placé pour me reprocher mon extrémisme. »
languages.original_text: "From what I know about you, Seberian, you are hardly the one to accuse me of excessive radicalism."

traits.locale_text: « À en juger par vos états de service, Seberian, vous êtes mal placé pour me reprocher mon extrémisme. »

languages.text: "Hakkında bildiklerimi düşününce Seberian, beni aşırı radikallikle suçlayacak son kişisin."
languages.original_text: "From what I know about you, Seberian, you are hardly the one to accuse me of excessive radicalism."

traits.locale_text: "Hakkında bildiklerimi düşününce Seberian, beni aşırı radikallikle suçlayacak son kişisin."

languages.text: 「私が知っているあなたのことを考えると、シベリア、あなたは私の過激な思想を非難するような人物ではないでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "From what I know about you, Seberian, you are hardly the one to accuse me of excessive radicalism."

traits.locale_text: 「私が知っているあなたのことを考えると、シベリア、あなたは私の過激な思想を非難するような人物ではないでしょう。」

languages.text: "Nach allem, was ich über Euch weiß, Seberian, seid Ihr der Letzte, der mir übermäßige Radikalität vorwerfen sollte."
languages.original_text: "From what I know about you, Seberian, you are hardly the one to accuse me of excessive radicalism."

traits.locale_text: "Nach allem, was ich über Euch weiß, Seberian, seid Ihr der Letzte, der mir übermäßige Radikalität vorwerfen sollte."
